howToPlayPage.title: How to Play Minesweeper
howToPlayPage.subtitle: Master the classic puzzle game with our complete guide
howToPlayPage.metaDescription: Learn how to play Minesweeper with our complete guide. Rules, strategy tips, number meanings, and FAQs to help you master the classic puzzle game.

objective.title: Objective
objective.description: Clear a rectangular board containing hidden mines without detonating any. Win by revealing all cells that don't contain mines.

clickToReveal.title: Click to Reveal
clickToReveal.description: Click any cell to reveal what's underneath. Your first click is always safe.

numbersShow.title: Numbers Show Adjacent Mines
numbersShow.description: A number shows how many mines are in the 8 surrounding cells. Blank means no adjacent mines.

flagMines.title: Flag Suspected Mines
flagMines.description: Right-click (desktop) or long-press (mobile) to flag cells you think contain mines.

avoidMines.title: Avoid the Mines
avoidMines.description: Click a mine and game over. Use numbers to deduce which cells are safe.

numbers.title: What the Numbers Mean
numbers.description: Each number indicates how many mines are in the 8 adjacent cells (including diagonals).

strategy.title: Strategy Tips
strategy.startCenterDesc: Often reveals more cells at once
strategy.patternsDesc: A "1" next to a single hidden cell = mine
strategy.cornersDesc: Fewer adjacent cells makes deduction easier
strategy.countMinesDesc: If a number has enough flagged mines, remaining cells are safe

goal.question: What is the goal of Minesweeper?
goal.answer: Clear the entire board without clicking on any mines. Use numbers to deduce which cells contain mines and flag them.

numbers.question: What do the numbers mean?
numbers.answer: Each number indicates how many mines are adjacent to that cell (including diagonals). A cell can have 0-8 adjacent mines.

flag.question: How do I flag a mine?
flag.answer: Right-click (desktop) or long-press (mobile) to place a flag. Click again to remove it.

clickMine.question: What happens if I click on a mine?
clickMine.answer: Game over. All mines are revealed. To win, reveal all non-mine cells without clicking any mines.

bestStrategy.question: What is the best strategy?
bestStrategy.answer: Start near the center. When you see a 1 next to a single unrevealed cell, that's a mine. Look for patterns where math clearly indicates mine locations.

backgroundSkinsPage.title: Minesweeper Background Skins - Free Cosmetic Themes
backgroundSkinsPage.description: Browse {count}+ public Minesweeper background skins with cosmetic themes ranging from clean classic looks to bold color palettes.

backgroundSkinsPage.heading: Minesweeper Background Skins
backgroundSkinsPage.intro: Background skins change the visual backdrop around the game while leaving Minesweeper gameplay untouched. Browse the published themes below and open each page for a full live preview.
backgroundSkinsPage.livePreview: This page uses the live {name} background as the preview, so you can see the full-page effect directly.
backgroundSkinsPage.exploreMore: If you want to compare it with other looks, you can browse the
backgroundSkinsPage.toTry: to try the available cosmetic themes.
backgroundSkinsPage.trySkin: Try the {name} background skin alongside cell skins and other visual customizations in the free online game.

gridSkinPage.trySkin: Try the {name} skin and many more in our free online Minesweeper game
gridSkinPage.faqWhatIs: What is the {name} skin in Minesweeper?
gridSkinPage.faqHowUnlock: How do I unlock the {name} Minesweeper skin?
gridSkinPage.faqHowUnlockAnswer: You can unlock the {name} skin by playing Minesweeper and earning AlfCoins. Visit the skins shop to purchase and apply it to your game.
gridSkinPage.faqChangeGameplayAnswer: No, the {name} skin is purely cosmetic. It changes how cells look but doesn't affect Minesweeper rules or difficulty.
gridSkinPage.faqFreeToPlayAnswer: Yes, Minesweeper is completely free to play online with various skins and themes available to unlock.
gridSkinPage.faqPreview: Can I preview the {name} skin before unlocking?
gridSkinPage.faqPreviewAnswer: Yes, you can see a preview of the {name} skin in the skins shop and on this page before deciding to unlock it.

playersPage.subtitle: Explore top players ranked by speed, wins, and experience. {count} players have earned their spot on our leaderboards.
playersPage.metaDescription: Compete on Minesweeper leaderboards. See top players ranked by fastest times, most wins, and games played. Track your own ranking.
playersPage.mostExperiencedDesc: Players with the most games played
playersPage.recentBestGamesDesc: The latest record-breaking performances from our community.
playersPage.aboutRankingsText1: Our leaderboards track player performance across multiple dimensions. The Fastest Times leaderboard shows players who have achieved the quickest winning games. Most Wins ranks players by total victories, while Most Experienced highlights dedicated players with the highest game count.
playersPage.aboutRankingsText2: Players are indexed on our site once they reach 50 games played, 10 wins, or record a best time. This ensures our leaderboards showcase committed players while keeping the index focused and crawlable.
